title: Under local vote semantics, inspect /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public for stale docs or prompt/check text that still claims assist defaults to claude or that codex+claude+glm is the default baseline after our Claude-free code change. Focus on README.md, docs/gha24-mainframe-flow.md, docs...
summary_text: **Verdict: NO-MERGE (independent recommendation)** 1. **Current status** - PR is mergeable from GitHub’s perspective: `mergeStateStatus: CLEAN`, `mergeable: MERGEABLE`, no blocking CI failures. - CI checks: `scan`, `actionlint`, `fast-gate`, and `Codex Review (Codex)` are **SUCCESS**; `canary-lite` is **SKIPPED**. 2. **Why this is high risk to merge now** - Core operational blast radius is very large: changes touch `codex-kernel-guard.sh`, scheduler/claim/driver/reconciler/status-surface scripts, canary harness/workflow wiring, local launchers, and kernel entrypoint. - This is not a low-risk refactor; it is a large runtime-path hardening change (`34` files, `~4.7k` additions). - No human review signal is present (`reviewDecision` empty; only automated bot-style review artifacts visible). - Automated review signal was “Changes Suggested” (score `6/10`) and the bot reports review/analysis execution errors in details payloads, reducing confidence. - `canary-lite` being skipped removes an explicit execution-path safety check for this PR. 3. **Operational safety / recovery posture** - If merged, rollback is still possible via normal revert, but recovery would be disruptive because the change set spans multiple coupled runtime components. - Recommended pre-merge recovery preparation: stage a **known-good revert/SHA plan** (`021ea923d30a0998462b8baadcf833ae5d754665`) and ensure an immediate rollback path is documented and practiced. 4. **Required blockers before merge** 1. Complete a human approval review focused on runtime semantics. 2. Run the PR’s own verification list in the branch environment, including: - `bash tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh` - `bash tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` - `bash tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh` - `bash tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh` - `bash tests/test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh` - `bash tests/test-codex-kernel-guard-doctor-flags.sh` - `bash tests/test-codex-kernel-guard-doctor.sh` - `bash tests/test-kernel-canary-plan.sh` 3. Confirm whether `canary-lite` should run for this change class; if so, un-skip it for this PR or run equivalent canary validation manually before merge.
